My Approach

Strategy meets execution.

I work in social media with a focus on how brands sound, not just what they post. My work sits between strategy and execution, translating brand identity into content that feels natural, using data and testing to refine performance over time.

01
Define
Brand Voice & Strategy
Start from identity, not tactics. I map brand values, audience segments, and competitive positioning to build a social strategy that feels coherent across platforms, seasons, and formats.
02
Create & Execute
Content That Converts
Full production ownership. From photo and video to copywriting, Canva design, and AI-assisted visual workflows, I keep output consistent and on-brand across multiple clients at once.
03
Measure & Scale
Performance & Paid Media
Data informs every decision. Monthly reporting to C-level and investors, Meta and Google Ads management, e-commerce optimisation, and continuous iteration based on KPIs.

Case Studies

Brands I've built
social voices for.

Each project started with a challenge. Here's how I approached it and what happened.

Retail · Italy · 45+ stores
Demenego S.p.A. · 2022–2026
Building a brand voice from scratch for Italy's optical retail chain

First in-house digital marketing hire. Social media had been managed externally with a product-centric approach that didn't reflect the brand's real positioning. I built the full function, strategy, content, paid media, replacing fragmented agency work with an owned, performance-driven brand voice. Reported also to CEO and PE investors on digital results.

65%avg engagement rate
2×web traffic YoY
+50%Amazon revenue YoY
~50%lower production costs
Instagram Facebook
Tourism · Cortina d'Ampezzo · Milano Cortina 2026
Tofana – Freccia nel Cielo · Ongoing
Turning a ski area's social channels into a year-round destination engine

Managing organic social strategy for a premium ski area in Cortina d'Ampezzo, in the lead-up to the Winter Olympics Milano Cortina 2026. The challenge: communicate year-round appeal beyond ski season while building community anticipation for one of sport's biggest events.

+200%FB interactions
6.2M+content views
+100%IG interactions
1.3M+IG content views
Instagram Facebook
DMO · Destination Marketing · 2020–2022
Cortina Marketing Se.Am · @cortinadolomiti
Growing the official voice of Cortina d'Ampezzo to 60K+ followers

The official social channels had to address tourists, locals, institutions, and international visitors simultaneously while maintaining a consistent tone across seasons, events, and formats. I grew from marketing intern to Social Media Specialist, producing photo, video and copy, coordinating influencer collaborations, and covering live events.

60K+followers reached
+37%follower growth
+85%interaction growth
370Ktotal interactions
@cortinadolomiti
Portfolio · Destination ecosystem · Olympics 2026
Freelance Portfolio · 2021–Present
Managing the full Cortina destination ecosystem ahead of the 2026 Winter Olympics

Parallel to my role at Demenego, I manage organic social strategy for a portfolio of destination brands in Cortina. Each brand has a distinct tone, audience, and seasonal calendar, with full content production across photo, video, and copy for all of them, consistently.

5brands managed
2026Olympics destination coverage
